com.hp.workpath.api.access

Class UserPreferencesAttributes.Builder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.access.UserPreferencesAttributes.Builder
  • Enclosing class:
    UserPreferencesAttributes

    public static final class UserPreferencesAttributes.Builder
extends java.lang.Object
    Builder for building user's preferences.
    Since:
    API 2

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Builder()
      Default constructor a new Builder with default attributes.

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Combines all of the attributes in this into a UserPreferencesAttributes object.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Builder

        public Builder()
        Default constructor a new Builder with default attributes.
        Since:
        API 2

    • Method Detail

      • setAutoLaunchAppAccessPointId

        public UserPreferencesAttributes.Builder setAutoLaunchAppAccessPointId(java.lang.String autoLaunchAppAccessPointId)

        Sets the UUID of an application access point which may be used by the device to automatically launch the application access point immediately after signing in. Ignored if the sign in process is not initiated by pressing the "Sign in" button on the device's home screen. Also ignored if the application access point is not present, is hidden, or is disabled on the device. For comparison purposes, devices will handle UUIDs as case-sensitive strings, meaning aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa != AAAAAAAA-AAAA-AAAA-AAAA-AAAAAAAA.

        Parameters:
        autoLaunchAppAccessPointId - The application ID
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Since:
        API 2

      • setLanguageCode

        public UserPreferencesAttributes.Builder setLanguageCode(java.lang.String languageCode)
        Sets the user's preferred language. If it's null, language on a device will not change.
        Parameters:
        languageCode - The valid language code
        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining
        Since:
        API 2

      • build

        public UserPreferencesAttributes build()
                                throws CapabilitiesExceededException
        Combines all of the attributes in this into a UserPreferencesAttributes object.
        Returns:
        UserPreferencesAttributes object containing all of the attributes.
        Throws:
        CapabilitiesExceededException - if attributes are out of supported range.
        Since:
        API 2
